hooks.description: Inject bugfix operating context at session start

steps.message: Bugfix plugin active. Use the bugfix skill for structured bug resolution — reproduction, root-cause diagnosis, fix, and prevention. Read AGENTS.md for the 7-phase loop.

hooks.description: Remind about fix tracking after file modifications

steps.message: File modified. If executing in the bugfix loop: track this change in the fix record (files_changed). Run the reproduction case and regression tests after modifications. Note any deviation from the diagnosed root cause.
Protected path detected. This file is guarded by bugfix rules (lock files, secrets, generated files, vendored code). Modification requires explicit acknowledgment in the bug fix record.
